titles.title: As the Deer Panteth for the Water

properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: As the deer panteth for the water So my soul longeth after Thee You alone are my heart’s desire And I long to worship Thee

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: You alone are my Strength, my Shield To You alone may my spirit yield You alone are my heart’s desire And I long to worship Thee.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: You’re my Friend and You are my Brother Even though You are a King I love You more than any other So much more than anything

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: I want You more than gold or silver Only You can satisfy You alone are the real joy-giver And the apple of my eye
